name: agent-os
description: Portable continuity for coding agents — STATUS.md source of truth, AGENTS.md spine, session protocol, sealed agent logs. Agent-agnostic (Codex, Claude, Grok, Gemini, Kimi, Cursor, Copilot, …) via the AGENTS.md standard; this plugin adds the Claude Code convenience layer. CLI at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-os.mjs.
